name: package-generator
author: lumine-code
description: Generates and opens a new sample package, language, or syntax theme.

createInDevMode.title: Create In Dev Mode
createInDevMode.description: When disabled, generated packages are linked into Lumine in both normal mode and dev mode. When enabled, generated packages are linked into Lumine only in dev mode.

packageSyntax.title: Package Syntax
packageSyntax.description: The syntax to generate packages with.
